feedback.metaGateSummary: F-01/F-02/F-03/F-04/F-05/F-06 all YES. All 7 files rewritten per spec D4/D5/D6/EC-05. No meta-gate failures.
feedback.specComplianceSummary: buildChangeSet signature corrected to ChangeMapState<TData> per spec D6. applyMapping exceptions propagate (no try/catch per D4). runValidator first message only per D5. removed rows mapped per EC-05. All spec drift resolved.
feedback.algorithmCorrection: buildChangeSet.ts L120-126: removed[] rows now applyMapping-transformed, satisfying EC-05 'removed rows mapped' requirement. Previous shallow clone fixed.
feedback.validatorSemantics: runValidator.ts L45: first error message only per spec D5 'message = result.errors?.[0] ?? (unknown error)'. Per-row single-error contract maintained (vs multi-message bug in previous score).
feedback.pureHelperPattern: C-32 cascade perfect: buildChangeSet pure (0 React import), applyMapping pure (0 side effects, exceptions propagate), runValidator pure (0 IO). useChangeTracking wraps in useCallback (React shell). Internal helpers NOT exported public.
feedback.cascadeOpportunity: F-02 F-05 F-06 corrections eliminate type incompatibility + error-handling mismatches. All AC satisfied: AC-001 (Mapping semantics) via D4 implementation. AC-002 (Validator semantics) via D5 'first message' policy. AC-003 (ChangeSet shape) via MappedRow[] alias. AC-005 (pass-through identity) via applyMapping shallow clone when mapping omitted. AC-008 (tsc 0) via B-01 PASS.
feedback.recommendedAction: PASS and proceed to verify phase (4 Gate — opus). buildChangeSet ready for integration testing in G-005 commitChanges + usage site migration.
